footer.tagline: Fitness competition platform for real training.

problem.p1: No pressure — missing a session has no consequence.
problem.p2: No accountability — nobody notices if you don't show up.
problem.p3: No reason to come back — progress feels invisible.

insight.body: Behavioral science is clear: loss aversion is 2x more motivating than the desire to gain. When performance is ranked, visible, and permanent — people show up differently. That's not motivation. That's environment design.

solution.feat1_desc: New challenge every day. Every session has stakes.
solution.feat2_desc: K-Rating updates in real-time. Public, permanent, undeniable.
solution.feat3_desc: NEXUS validates every rep. You can't fake your score.

howItWorks.s1_desc: Every day NEXUS assigns a challenge to your profile. No browsing. No selection. Execute.
howItWorks.s2_desc: Puppet Motion Detection. Bad form rejected. Every certified rep builds your score.
howItWorks.s3_desc: K-Rating adjusts after every validated execution. Public. Permanent. Real.
howItWorks.s4_desc: Tomorrow NEXUS assigns the next challenge. The system never stops.

gyms.body: The average gym loses 80% of new members within 6 months. ArenaKore gives you a competition layer that makes members come back — because now they have something to lose.
gyms.f2: Live challenge system — no manual setup
gyms.f3: Box vs box competition across locations

home.positioning_body: ArenaKore is a NEXUS-driven execution system. No browsing. No selection. NEXUS assigns. You execute. Your rank is the result.
home.positioning_tomorrow_val: Every sport on the planet. One execution system.
home.disciplines_global: NEXUS drives the system. Athletes execute.
home.d1_desc: Daily challenges, NEXUS rep validation, box vs box competition.
home.d2_desc: Time, pace, splits. Compete against runners worldwide.
home.d3_desc: Shots, dribbling, 1v1. Your court becomes a leaderboard.
home.d4_desc: Lap times, stroke analysis, competitive performance data.
home.d5_desc: Scorecard competition. Handicap-based ranking. Permanent results.
home.d6_desc: Session scoring, outdoor competition. The ocean is your arena.
home.d7_desc: Group challenges, team K-Flux. Compete as a unit.
home.d8_desc: Set your own standard. Any movement. Any goal. Your rules.
home.gyms_body: The average gym loses 80% of new members within 6 months. ArenaKore gives you a competition layer that makes members come back — because now they have something to lose.
home.disciplines_sub: One ranking system. One identity. Any sport.

identity.pretext: ONCE YOU ENTER, YOU'RE NOT JUST AN ATHLETE.
identity.body: A KORE is not a user. Not a member. Not a subscriber. A KORE is a competitor with a permanent record, a certified rank, and an identity built entirely on real performance.

whatIsKore.challenges_desc: NEXUS-assigned. Daily. Permanent. Every challenge you execute becomes your record.
whatIsKore.ranking_desc: K-Rating from 0 to 1000. Earned through performance. Updated after every session.
whatIsKore.competition_desc: The Arena never closes. There is always someone above you. Always someone coming for your rank.
whatIsKore.visibility_desc: Your performance is public. Your history is permanent. You can't hide your numbers here.

kflux.body: K-Flux is the currency of the Arena. It doesn't come from showing up. It comes from performing. From being consistent. From pushing past the rep you were about to skip.
kflux.f1_desc: Show up 7 days in a row. The K-Timeline tracks every session.
kflux.f2_desc: Every rep certified by NEXUS. Every score earned, not claimed.
kflux.f3_desc: Accept challenges. Win duels. Enter live events. K-Flux multiplies.

nexus.body: NEXUS doesn't watch you train. It judges you. Puppet Motion Detection tracks every joint, every angle, every rep. A rep that doesn't meet standard doesn't count. That's not punishment. That's truth.
nexus.f1_desc: Joint angles, movement timing, range of motion — captured in real-time.
nexus.f2_desc: Every session feeds your DNA profile: VEL, FOR, RES, AGI, TEC, POT.
nexus.f3_desc: Your DNA score evolves. Not on paper. In data. Visible to everyone.

challenges.yourself_desc: Your biggest opponent is yesterday's score. K-Rating never lets you forget what you've already done.
challenges.friend_desc: Send a challenge. They accept. NEXUS validates both. The result is public, permanent, undeniable.
challenges.crew_desc: Build or join a KORE Crew. Combined K-Flux. Shared ranking. Collective competition.
challenges.live_desc: Synchronized challenges across the platform. Everyone competes simultaneously. One winner.

finalPush.body: Right now, someone is training harder than you. They're in the Arena. Are you?

pilot.sub: Turn your gym into a daily challenge system.
pilot.stat1: of members disappear within 6 months of joining.
pilot.stat2: consequences for not showing up. Nobody notices.
pilot.stat3: of members return after a month away without an external trigger.
pilot.fact_text: Your best members already train 5 times a week. The problem is everyone else.
pilot.insight_body: Behavioral psychology is clear: loss aversion is 2x more motivating than the desire to improve. When there's a visible ranking and a rival overtaking you, the brain activates differently. This isn't theory. This is what happens in every gym that introduces structured competition.
pilot.sol1_desc: Every day a new challenge with timer, target and automatic rep validation.
pilot.sol2_desc: Real-time leaderboard. Your members see each other, compare, challenge.
pilot.sol3_desc: Every session updates K-Rating. Progress is public, certified, real.
pilot.sol4_desc: Natural rivalries between members. Who's ahead, who's chasing, who needs to prove themselves.
pilot.step1_desc: We select with you the most engaged members for the launch. Onboarded in 30 minutes with KORE ID and first challenge.
pilot.step2_desc: We set up the first week of custom challenges on your programming. No change to your method.
pilot.step3_desc: NEXUS validates every rep. K-Rating updates after each session. You see who trains, who climbs, who's at risk.
pilot.step4_desc: After 14 days you have real data: more attendance, more interaction, visible ranking. Then you decide.
pilot.after1: More sessions per member: the active challenge creates a reason to return every day.
pilot.after2: Natural interaction between members: rankings, rivalries, performance comments.
pilot.after3: Structured internal competition: everyone knows where they stand in the ranking.
pilot.after4: Stronger community: the Arena identity is shared, proud, competitive.
pilot.boxvbox_p1: Multiple locations? Your members can compete against each other across different sites. Location 1 challenges Location 2. The ranking shows which has the strongest members. This is the dynamic that makes people talk, return, and stay.
pilot.boxvbox_p2: Even with one location, box vs box plays out with nearby gyms in your city through ArenaKore's Hub Map.
pilot.offer_body: No contract. No credit card. Just 14 days to see what happens when your gym becomes competitive.
pilot.step_form1: Fill out the form — takes 2 minutes
pilot.step_form3: Setup and onboarding in less than 1 hour
pilot.limited_text: We accept a limited number of gyms each month to ensure quality onboarding. Book your slot now.
pilot.form_trustLine: Zero cost. No commitment. Just results.
pilot.form_error_send: Error sending. Try again or write to support@arenakore.com
pilot.faq_q1: Do I need to change my workouts?
pilot.faq_a1: No. ArenaKore integrates with any type of programming. It doesn't change your method — it adds a competitive layer on top of what you already do. Your WODs remain yours.
pilot.faq_a2: No. ArenaKore works for CrossFit, functional training, bootcamp, traditional gyms and any facility that does group or individual workouts with verifiable movements.
pilot.faq_a3: Our team handles all onboarding. From when you confirm the pilot, your 20–30 members are operational in less than 48 hours. No technical intervention required from you.
pilot.faq_a4: The pilot ends. No cost, no commitment. We keep the data collected, you keep the experience and insights on your members' performance. You have nothing to lose.
pilot.faq_q5: Do my members need to download an app?
pilot.faq_a5: Yes. Each member creates a free KORE ID on ArenaKore. Onboarding takes about 5 minutes. Our team supports your members during the first setup.

support.sub: We're here to help you get the most out of ArenaKore. Find answers below or contact us directly.
support.t1_desc: Login, password, account creation, KORE ID recovery.
support.t2_desc: Problems with creating, joining or completing challenges.
support.t3_desc: NEXUS validation issues, rep counts, K-Rating questions.
support.t4_desc: App crashes, loading issues, unexpected behavior.
support.contact_tip: For urgent issues, include your KORE ID in the subject line.
support.response_text: Standard: 24–48 hours · Business accounts: priority queue
support.faq_q1: How do I reset my password?
support.faq_a1: Go to the login screen and tap "Forgot password". Enter your email and follow the reset link sent to your inbox.
support.faq_q2: Why did NEXUS not count my rep?
support.faq_a2: NEXUS rejects reps that do not meet the required range of motion or movement standard. Review the movement demo in the challenge details and ensure full depth or extension.
support.faq_q3: How do I delete my account?
support.faq_a3: Navigate to Settings → Account → Delete Account. Note that this will permanently remove your KORE ID, K-Rating and challenge history.
support.faq_q4: My K-Rating did not update after a challenge. Why?
support.faq_a4: K-Rating updates process within 5 minutes of challenge completion. If your rating has not updated after 30 minutes, contact support with your KORE ID.
support.faq_q5: How do I register my gym on ArenaKore?
support.faq_a5: Visit arenakore.com/for-gyms and start your 14-day free pilot. You will receive an admin dashboard for creating and managing challenges.
support.still_need: Still need help? Reach out directly.

getApp.free_note: Free · No credit card · Available worldwide
getApp.track_body: NEXUS validates every rep, every result. Nothing is lost. Nothing is inflated. Your history is permanent.
getApp.rank_headline: You are not training. You are competing.
getApp.rank_body: K-Rating from 0 to 1000. Updated after every session. Compared globally. You always know where you stand.
getApp.challenge_body: Direct 1v1. Open events. Live competitions. The Arena is always open. There is always someone to beat.
getApp.sport_body: ArenaKore works across any discipline. One identity. One ranking. Any sport.
getApp.final_body: The Arena is open. Your rank is waiting. Every day you delay is a day someone else moves ahead.

ui.blog_sub: Competition. Science. Training. No fluff. Just what works.
ui.blog_stop_sub: Everything you read here applies directly inside ArenaKore.

arena.hero_sub: NEXUS assigns. You execute. Your rank is the result.
arena.hero_sub2: No selection. No browsing. Pure execution.
arena.not_fitness_app: This is not a fitness app. NEXUS runs the system. Athletes execute.
arena.track_body: Every rep captured and certified by NEXUS in real-time.
arena.rank_body: K-Rating from 0 to 1000. Updated after every session.
arena.challenge_body: New challenges every day. The Arena never closes.
arena.why_1_body: When your score is public and NEXUS-certified, every session has real consequence. No self-reporting. No excuses.
arena.why_2_body: K-Rating is not self-declared. It is NEXUS-assigned after every validated performance. Every athlete has earned their rank.
arena.why_3_body: NEXUS assigns daily challenges. Athletes execute. Repetition builds habits that self-motivation alone cannot sustain.
arena.sport_body: ArenaKore is not built for one sport. It's built for any activity where performance can be measured, validated and compared.
arena.nexus_body: Puppet Motion Detection. Real-time bio-analysis. Bad form doesn't count.
arena.final_body: ArenaKore is a universal competition system for any performance-based activity.
